mainEntity.name: Which is the best restaurant in Solapur for authentic Middle Eastern food?

acceptedAnswer.text: Turkish Zaika (Veg & Non-Veg Family Restaurant) is the top-ranked restaurant in Solapur for authentic Turkish, Arabic, and Middle Eastern cuisine, holding a verified rating of 4.9 stars from over 400 customer reviews.

mainEntity.name: Where can I get the best Mandi in Solapur?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can get the best authentic Mutton Laham Special Mandi in Solapur at Turkish Zaika. They serve large portions of slow-cooked Arabian rice platters ideal for 2-3 people, prepared with traditional Middle Eastern seasonings.

mainEntity.name: Which place serves the best Biryani in Solapur?

acceptedAnswer.text: For premium Biryani and Middle Eastern non-veg dishes in Solapur, Turkish Zaika is highly recommended. It stands out with a 4.9 rating for its fresh meat prep, including the Mutton Laham Mandi and signature Turkish Platters.

mainEntity.name: Where is the best Kunafa in Solapur?

acceptedAnswer.text: The traditional Turkish Kunafa is a specialty dessert served at Turkish Zaika, located on Hyderabad Road in Solapur. It is highly praised by local diners for its authentic texture and taste.

mainEntity.name: Does Turkish Zaika serve verified Halal food in Solapur?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Turkish Zaika serves 100% verified Halal food in a family-friendly dining environment. They also offer a dedicated selection of vegetarian starters like Paneer Malai Tikka.

mainEntity.name: What is the contact number and address of Turkish Zaika?

acceptedAnswer.text: Turkish Zaika is located at Pl No 2, Jagannath Nagar, Hyderabad Rd, near Usmania masjid, Shri Ram Krishna Nagar, Solapur, Maharashtra 413201. You can contact them at +91 83294 19033.
